examples:
Command Example
cylance-protect-get-indicators-report token=As3424$%
Raw Output
There is no raw output for this command.
13. Get information for threats
Returns information for threats.
Base Command
cylance-protect-get-threats
name: cylance-protect-get-threats

outputs.description: Threat classification for the threat File.SubClassification Threat sub-classification for the threat
outputs.name: File.Classification

outputs.description: SHA-256 hash for the threat File.Safelisted Identifies if the threat is on the Safe List
outputs.name: File.Sha256

outputs.description: Threat name File.LastFound Date and time (in UTC) when the file was last found
outputs.name: File.Name

outputs.description: The Cylance Score assigned to the threat File.GlobalQuarantine Identifies if the threat is on the Global Quarantine list
outputs.name: File.CylanceScore

outputs.description: The threat was identified by Cylance but not by other anti-virus sources File.FileSize File size
outputs.name: File.UniqueToCylance

outputs.description: MD5 hash for the threat DBotScore.Indicator The tested indicator
outputs.name: File.Md5

outputs.description: Indicator type DBotScore.Vendor Vendor used to calculate the score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
